chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 1903 of 2024 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on CMA No.7190/2024 (U/A) 2. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 3. For orders on CMA No.7191/2024 (Ex.A) 4. For hearing of main case 03.04.2025 Mr. Seengar Ali Shar, Advocate for the Petitioner >>>>>..<<<<< Counsel for the Petitioner under instructions does not press instant Constitutional Petition. Accordingly, the same is dismissed as not pressed along with listed applications. Judge Judge ARBROHI
